hero.label: Connect With Afari
hero.heading: Every Meaningful Journey Begins With a Conversation.
hero.subheading: Whether you're exploring partnerships, expeditions, creative collaborations, or future ventures, we'd love to hear from you.
hero.imageAlt: Travelers gathered around a campfire at dusk

intro.label: Welcome
intro.statement: Afari Trails exists through connection — between people, landscapes, stories, and ideas.
intro.body: Reach out for expedition inquiries, hospitality and venture partnerships, media and storytelling collaborations, conservation and community initiatives, or simply to share a vision. We read every message with care.

form.label: Begin Together
form.heading: Begin the Conversation
form.subtext: We look forward to hearing your story, ideas, and vision.
form.successMessage: Thank you. Your message has been received — we will be in touch when the trail aligns.

newsletter.heading: Stay Close to the Trail
newsletter.subtext: Stories, expeditions, and reflections from across Africa.
newsletter.successMessage: Welcome to the trail — we'll be in touch.

closing.quote: The best journeys begin with connection.

hero.label: Plan Your Journey
hero.heading: Every Great Expedition Begins With a Conversation.
hero.subheading: Tell us how you imagine Africa — pace, places, companions, and the kind of journey you want to remember for a lifetime.
hero.imageAlt: Safari vehicle on the savanna at golden hour

intro.label: For Travelers
intro.statement: We design expeditions for people who want more than a checklist — presence, wonder, and connection to wild places.
intro.body: Share your dates, interests, group size, and dream destinations. Our team will help shape a curated itinerary across Zambia and beyond — paced for stillness, not rush.

items.title: Custom Safari
items.description: A journey built entirely around you.

items.title: Group Expedition
items.description: Travel with a curated small group.

items.title: Questions & Guidance
items.description: Not sure where to begin — we're here.

form.label: Your Journey
form.heading: Tell us about your expedition
form.subtext: We read every inquiry personally and respond with care — usually within a few days.
form.successMessage: Thank you. Your journey begins here — we'll be in touch soon to start planning.

newsletter.heading: Stories From the Trail
newsletter.subtext: Expedition inspiration, field notes, and new journeys across Africa.

closing.quote: The wilderness does not rush. Neither should the journey to reach it.
